app.title: CLI Hub
app.selectTool: Select a tool from the sidebar to get started.

sidebar.noTools: No tools imported yet. Use the + button to import a CLI tool binary.
sidebar.deleteConfirm: Remove {{name}} from CLI Hub? This only removes the copy in the tools directory.

console.ready: Ready. Select a tool and click Execute to begin.

settings.title: Settings
settings.cliPathDesc: Specify a directory to store and manage your CLI tools. A cli/ subdirectory will be created automatically.
settings.cliDirHint: A cli/ directory will be created at the specified path to store imported tools.
settings.dbDirHint: Settings and persistence data are stored in cli/../db/settings.json
